summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HWI Time Tracker application. Backend APIs mostly functional (92.9% success rate) with one critical issue. Frontend authentication and basic UI working correctly with dark theme implementation.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks users from starting work sessions - core functionality broken
critical_bugs.error_details: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]
critical_bugs.root_cause: MongoDB ObjectId objects are not JSON serializable and causing FastAPI response serialization to fail

ui_bugs.issue: Start button doesn't transition to active state due to backend API failure

integration_issues.issue: Cannot start work sessions due to backend API 500 error

passed_tests: User registration via API and UI
User login via API and UI
Time entry pause/resume/end operations (when entry exists)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in /api/time-entries/start endpoint. The backend is using UUIDs correctly but MongoDB's _id field is causing JSON serialization errors. Need to exclude _id field from responses or ensure proper serialization handling.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (authentication, navigation, UI working; time tracking blocked by backend issue)
